summary: Completed testing of breakout target projections in PatternSVGOverlay. Backend API working correctly, but frontend overlay not rendering target projections.

ui_bugs.issue: Target projections not rendering - no breakout arrows, R:/S: labels, or bias indicators visible
ui_bugs.selector: svg elements with pattern overlay content

ui_bugs.issue: Component not receiving data or not being rendered - no debug logs found

integration_issues.issue: Backend returns correct breakout scenarios but frontend overlay doesn't render them

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC returns correct breakout scenarios
Backend API returns active_range data with support/resistance levels
Frontend chart loads and displays candlestick data correctly
Frontend shows basic chart interface with price data
action_item_for_main_agent: PatternSVGOverlay component is not rendering breakout target projections despite backend API returning correct data. Issues: 1) Component may not be receiving data props correctly, 2) showPatternOverlay flag may be false, 3) Data mapping from ta_layers to component props needs verification, 4) SVG coordinate conversion may be failing. Need to debug data flow from ResearchChart to PatternSVGOverlay.
